content:
```diff
+ # Day/Night Cycle Visual Theme Design Document
+
+ ## Overview
+ This design specifies a 5-minute day/night cycle for the pixel engine with smooth transitions and distinct visual modes for day and night. The overlay is applied as a final compositing step after all rooms are drawn.
+
+ ## Cycle Timing
+ - Total cycle duration: 5 minutes (300 seconds)
+ - Phases:
+   - Day: 2 minutes 30 seconds (150 seconds)
+   - Sunset transition: 30 seconds
+   - Night: 2 minutes (120 seconds)
+   - Sunrise transition: 30 seconds
+
+ ## Visual Modes and Effects
+
+ ### Day Mode
+ - Ambient light: warm white
+   - Ambient color: rgba(255, 244, 214, 1) (a warm white tone)
+ - Torches: subtle glow, low intensity
+ - Windows: normal content (no stars)
+ - Overlay: none (fully transparent)
+
+ ### Sunset Transition (Day → Night)
+ - Duration: 30 seconds
+ - Color shift: gradual shift from warm white to dark blue overlay
+ - Overlay opacity: increases smoothly from 0 to 0.4
+ - Torches: glow intensity increases from subtle to prominent
+ - Windows: star visibility gradually appears
+
+ ### Night Mode
+ - Ambient light: dark blue overlay
+   - Overlay color: rgba(0, 0, 40, 0.4)
+ - Torches: prominent glow, high intensity
+ - Windows: star content visible (white pixel stars with subtle twinkle)
+ - Overlay applied as a semi-transparent dark blue layer over the entire scene
+
+ ### Sunrise Transition (Night → Day)
+ - Duration: 30 seconds
+ - Color shift: overlay opacity decreases smoothly from 0.4 to 0
+ - Torches: glow intensity decreases from prominent to subtle
+ - Windows: stars fade out gradually
+
+ ## Overlay Application
+ - The dark blue overlay (rgba(0, 0, 40, alpha)) is applied as the final compositing step after all rooms and elements are drawn.
+ - Alpha varies by phase:
+   - Day: 0
+   - Sunset: 0 → 0.4 (linear increase)
+   - Night: 0.4
+   - Sunrise: 0.4 → 0 (linear decrease)
+
+ ## Color Shift Values by Phase
+ | Phase   | Ambient Color (RGBA)       | Overlay Color (RGBA)       | Overlay Opacity | Torch Glow Intensity | Window Stars Visibility |
+ |---------|----------------------------|----------------------------|-----------------|----------------------|-------------------------|
+ | Day     | (255, 244, 214, 1)         | (0, 0, 0, 0)               | 0               | Low (e.g., 0.3)      | 0 (hidden)              |
+ | Sunset  | Interpolated warm to blue  | (0, 0, 40, 0 → 0.4)        | 0 → 0.4         | Increasing 0.3 → 1.0 | Increasing 0 → 1        |
+ | Night   | (255, 244, 214, 0.6) dimmed| (0, 0, 40, 0.4)            | 0.4             | High (1.0)           | 1 (visible)             |
+ | Sunrise | Interpolated blue to warm  | (0, 0, 40, 0.4 → 0)        | 0.4 → 0         | Decreasing 1.0 → 0.3 | Decreasing 1 → 0        |
+
+ ## Implementation Notes
+ - The engine should track elapsed time modulo 300 seconds to determine current phase and progress.
+ - Color and opacity interpolations should be linear for smooth transitions.
+ - Torch glow intensity controls the brightness of torch sprites.
+ - Window star visibility controls whether star pixels are drawn in window areas.
+ - The overlay is drawn last, covering the entire canvas with the specified rgba color and opacity.
+
+ ---
+ This design enables immersive day/night visuals with smooth transitions and thematic lighting consistent with the pixel art style.
```
